evals.prompt: Use coze-js-api to transcribe this Douyin video: https://v.douyin.com/gtSMSkIh3p0/ . My api_key is dddd. Give me the exact curl and explain expected errors.
evals.expected_output: Constructs correct POST curl with JSON body containing url and api_key, endpoint is transcribe-douyin, and includes troubleshooting notes.

evals.prompt: I copied this from Douyin: 4.12 11/27 YZz:/ E@h.bn AI人工智能"侦破"60年前的陈年悬案 https://v.douyin.com/gtSMSkIh3p0/ 复制此链接，打开Dou音搜索，直接观看视频！ Use key dddd and call the API.
evals.expected_output: Extracts URL from mixed text, builds valid JSON curl request, and reports result format clearly.

evals.prompt: My transcribe-douyin request keeps failing with exit code 1. Diagnose likely causes and generate a corrected curl using url https://v.douyin.com/xxxx/ and api_key dddd.
evals.expected_output: Provides corrected command syntax, identifies common failure reasons, and proposes a concrete next troubleshooting step.
